aside.jobTitle: Josefine Eriksson, Fullstack Developer & Graphic/Web Designer

fullstack.title: Fullstack Developer & Graphic Designer
fullstack.description: Combining technology and design to create complete solutions – from modern code and user-friendly UX/UI interfaces to visual identities with logos, banners, and printed materials. Focus on professional and engaging solutions that strengthen brands and services.

frontend.description: Internship (LIA) - hitract.se is a platform for students and student unions. Working with frontend development in React, Next.js with Material UI based on Figma designs from UX/UI designers.

aboutMe.title: About me
aboutMe.p1: My name is Josefine, I'm 40 years old and I live in Mjölby with my two teenage daughters.
aboutMe.p2: Full-stack developer with roots in frontend. With several years of experience in HTML, CSS, graphic design and image editing as my foundation, I have expanded into modern full-stack development with React, Next.js and Node.js. I build accessible, responsive interfaces with a trained eye for detail and a strong sense of visual identity.
aboutMe.p3: My interest in IT goes back to 2007 – even then I was drawn to digital creation, from designing blogs and banners to writing simple scripts and running my own online store and fyndiq.se with self-designed products. That curiosity has never left me.
aboutMe.p4: Through my ongoing internship at hitract.se I have gained valuable hands-on experience in modern web development, and I also run kodochdesign.se where I take on smaller projects. My main goal is to find a position in full-stack or frontend development where I can grow professionally and contribute to innovative projects – aiming for a start in spring.
aboutMe.p5: I am a driven person who enjoys taking on new challenges and genuinely values continuous learning, both professionally and personally. When I'm not coding I recharge in nature, play piano, do crafts or unwind with gaming. I believe in the balance between performing and recovering.
aboutMe.p6: When I'm not coding, I enjoy recharging in nature, playing piano, crafting, or relaxing with computer games or piano. I value the balance between performing and recovering.
